git._comment: Deploys are run manually with `vercel --prod --yes` from apps/admin and apps/web. Git-triggered deploys are off entirely: `false` rather than `{ main: false }`, because the object form only covered main and let every branch push start a preview build. Those previews build from the repo root (the projects have no Root Directory set), then fail looking for .next/routes-manifest.json there instead of in apps/*/.next — so every PR showed two red checks for builds nobody wanted.
